<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<meta name="description" content="Bumper-AI generates professional demand letters for underpaid or denied auto insurance claims in Texas. Our AI bumps up your insurer's offer."/>
<title>reclaims-AI — Fight Back Against Your Insurer</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  :root {
    --bg: #FFFFFF;
    --surface: #F5F3FF;
    --surface-2: #EEEAFD;
    --text: #1E1145;
    --muted: #6B7280;
    --accent: #7C3AED;
    --accent-h: #6D28D9;
    --highlight: #EDE9FE;
    --font: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
  }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { font-family: var(--font); background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }

  /* ── NAV ── */
  .nav {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 0 48px;
    height: 64px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--highlight);
    background: #fff;
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 50;
  }
  .nav-logo { height: 72px; width: auto; display: block; }
  .nav-cta {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent);
    text-decoration: none;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--accent);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 7px 18px;
    transition: background .15s, color .15s;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; }

  /* ── ANNOUNCEMENT BANNER ── */
  .banner {
    background: var(--surface);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--highlight);
    padding: 10px 24px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--text);
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .pill { font-weight: 700; font-size: 11px; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .6px; white-space: nowrap; }
  .pill-dark  { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; }
  .pill-light { background: var(--highlight); color: var(--accent); }
  .banner s { color: var(--muted); }
  .banner strong { color: var(--text); }
  .banner a { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid currentColor; }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    padding: 72px 24px 64px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .hero-inner { max-width: 780px; margin: 0 auto; }

  .hero-eyebrow {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: var(--highlight);
    color: var(--accent);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: .8px;
    padding: 5px 14px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow span { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent); display: inline-block; }

  .hero h1 {
    font-size: clamp(36px, 5.5vw, 58px);
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.1;
    letter-spacing: -.5px;
    color: var(--text);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .hero h1 em {
    font-style: normal;
    color: var(--accent);
  }

  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 18px;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.65;
    max-width: 520px;
    margin: 0 auto 36px;
  }

  .hero-actions {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .btn {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--accent);
    color: #fff;
    font-family: var(--font);
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 16px;
    padding: 15px 44px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background .15s, transform .1s;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .btn:hover { background: var(--accent-h); }
  .btn:active { transform: scale(.98); }

  .trust {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--muted);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 16px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .trust-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
  .trust-item::before { content: "✓"; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; }

  /* ── SOCIAL PROOF BAR ── */
  .proof-bar {
    background: var(--surface);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--highlight);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--highlight);
    padding: 18px 24px;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--muted);
  }
  .proof-bar strong { color: var(--text); }

  /* ── PROBLEM ── */
  .problem {
    padding: 72px 24px;
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 48px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .problem-text h2 {
    font-size: clamp(26px, 3vw, 38px);
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.2;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    color: var(--text);
  }
  .problem-text p {
    font-size: 17px;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.75;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .problem-text p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
  .problem-text .accent { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 700; }
  .problem-cards { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; }
  .problem-card {
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--highlight);
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 20px 22px;
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }
  .problem-card-icon {
    font-size: 22px;
    line-height: 1;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-top: 2px;
  }
  .problem-card-text { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.6; }
  .problem-card-text strong { color: var(--text); display: block; font-size: 15px; margin-bottom: 3px; }

  /* ── HOW IT WORKS ── */
  .how {
    background: var(--surface);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--highlight);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--highlight);
    padding: 72px 24px;
  }
  .how-inner { max-width: 960px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-label {
    display: block;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    color: var(--accent);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .how h2 {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: clamp(24px, 3vw, 38px);
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.2;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    color: var(--text);
  }
  .how-sub {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 52px;
  }
  .steps {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .step {
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid var(--highlight);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 28px 24px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .step-number {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: .8px;
    color: var(--accent);
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .step-number::before {
    content: "";
    display: inline-block;
    width: 28px; height: 28px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--accent);
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 28px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .step:nth-child(1) .step-number::before { content: "1"; }
  .step:nth-child(2) .step-number::before { content: "2"; }
  .step:nth-child(3) .step-number::before { content: "3"; }
  .step h3 { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 12px; color: var(--text); }
  .step ul { list-style: none; }
  .step ul li {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.6;
    padding: 5px 0 5px 20px;
    position: relative;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--highlight);
  }
  .step ul li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .step ul li::before { content: "→"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--accent); font-size: 12px; top: 6px; }
  .footnotes { margin-top: 28px; text-align: center; font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); }

  /* ── QUOTES ── */
  .quotes-section { padding: 72px 24px; }
  .quotes-inner { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .quotes-section h2 {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: clamp(22px, 2.5vw, 32px);
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    color: var(--text);
  }
  .quotes { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 20px; }
  .quote-card {
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--highlight);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 28px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .quote-card::before {
    content: "\201C";
    position: absolute;
    top: 16px; left: 22px;
    font-size: 48px;
    color: var(--accent);
    opacity: .25;
    font-family: Georgia, serif;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .quote-text {
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    color: var(--text);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    padding-top: 12px;
  }
  .quote-meta { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; }
  .quote-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); }
  .quote-detail { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); }

  /* ── FINAL CTA ── */
  .final {
    background: var(--text);
    padding: 80px 24px;
    text-align: center;
    color: #fff;
  }
  .final-eyebrow {
    display: inline-block;
    background: rgba(124,58,237,.35);
    color: #c4b5fd;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: .8px;
    padding: 4px 14px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .final h2 {
    font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 44px);
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #fff;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    line-height: 1.15;
  }
  .final-sub {
    font-size: 17px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,.65);
    max-width: 480px;
    margin: 0 auto 36px;
    line-height: 1.65;
  }
  .final-cta-group {
    display: inline-flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: stretch;
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 400px;
  }
  .pricing-cards {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    width: 100%;
  }
  .pricing-card {
    flex: 1;
  }
  .btn-final {
    width: 100%;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .pricing-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 16px 24px;
    text-align: left;
    min-width: 180px;
  }
  .pricing-card-label { font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .6px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.5); margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: 700; }
  .pricing-card-value { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; }
  .pricing-card-value s { font-size: 15px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.4); font-weight: 400; text-decoration: line-through; }
  .pricing-card-badge { display: inline-block; background: #7C3AED; color: #fff; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .5px; margin-left: 6px; vertical-align: middle; }
  .final .btn { background: #fff; color: var(--accent); font-size: 16px; padding: 16px 48px; }
  .final .btn:hover { background: #f3f0ff; }
  .risk { margin-top: 16px; font-size: 13px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.5); }
  .problem-text em { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); font-style: normal; display: block; margin-top: 16px; line-height: 1.6; border-top: 1px solid var(--highlight); padding-top: 14px; }

  /* ── MODAL (unchanged) ── */
  .overlay { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(30,17,69,.48); z-index: 100; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
  .overlay.open { display: flex; }
  .modal { background: #fff; border-radius: 20px; padding: 40px; max-width: 480px; width: 90%; position: relative; animation: slideUp .22s ease; }
  @keyframes slideUp { from { transform: translateY(20px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } }
  .modal-close { position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 20px; background: none; border: none; font-size: 22px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1; }
  .modal-close:hover { color: var(--text); }
  .modal h2 { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px; color: var(--text); }
  .modal > p { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 24px; }
  .form-group { margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .form-group label { display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px; color: var(--text); }
  .form-group input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1.5px solid var(--highlight); border-radius: 8px; font-size: 15px; font-family: var(--font); color: var(--text); outline: none; transition: border .15s; }
  .form-group input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }
  .success-view { display: none; text-align: center; padding: 10px 0; }
  .success-view.show { display: block; }
  .success-icon { font-size: 48px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .success-view h3 { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: var(--text); }
  .success-view p  { font-size: 15px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.65; margin-bottom: 22px; }
  .stripe-btn { display: inline-block; background: var(--accent); color: #fff; font-family: var(--font); font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; padding: 14px 34px; border-radius: 10px; text-decoration: none; transition: background .15s; }
  .stripe-btn:hover { background: var(--accent-h); }
  .form-error { color: #ef4444; font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 12px; display: none; }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 820px) {
    .problem { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .steps { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .quotes { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .final-cta-group { max-width: 100%; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .nav { padding: 0 20px; }
    .hero { padding: 52px 20px 48px; }
    .problem { padding: 52px 20px; }
    .how { padding: 52px 20px; }
    .quotes-section { padding: 52px 20px; }
    .final { padding: 60px 20px; }
    .banner { font-size: 12px; gap: 6px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav class="nav">
  <img class="nav-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Bumper-AI"/>
  <a class="nav-cta" href="https://wipster0.gumroad.com/l/sycedh" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Join Alpha →</a>
</nav>

<div class="banner">
  <span class="pill pill-dark">Alpha Launch</span>
  <span>Letter fee: <s>$18</s> → <strong>$6</strong></span>
  <span class="pill pill-light">67% OFF</span>
  <span>Success fee: <s>15%</s> → <strong>$0 — forever</strong></span>
  <a href="https://wipster0.gumroad.com/l/sycedh" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Claim your spot →</a>
</div>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <h1>Insurers have a team of lawyers.<br/>Now you have an AI team.</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub"><span style="color:var(--accent);font-weight:700">B</span>umper-AI generates professional demand letters for underpaid or denied auto insurance claims in Texas. Our AI bumps up your insurer's offer.</p>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <button class="btn" onclick="openModal()">Check My Claim!</button>
      <div class="trust">
        <span class="trust-item">Takes 3 min</span>
        <span class="trust-item">Texas drivers only</span>
        <span class="trust-item">No fine print (that's for insurers)</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="proof-bar">
  Texas drivers are already getting results — <strong>join the Alpha waitlist before spots close.</strong>
</div>

<section class="problem">
  <div class="problem-text">
    <h2>Insurers bet you won't fight back.</h2>
    <p>Your insurer lowballed you. Or stalled. Or just said no.</p>
    <p>Most drivers give up — <span class="accent">but now you don't have to.</span></p>
    <p><em>Note: Bumper-AI is a document generation tool, not a legal service. It does not provide legal advice. For complex disputes, consult a licensed attorney.</em></p>
  </div>
  <div class="problem-cards">
    <div class="problem-card">
      <div class="problem-card-icon">💸</div>
      <div class="problem-card-text">
        <strong>Offer came in way too low?</strong>
        Total loss payouts are often well below what drivers expect. A written dispute puts your position on record.
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="problem-card">
      <div class="problem-card-icon">🕐</div>
      <div class="problem-card-text">
        <strong>Waiting weeks with no update?</strong>
        Texas has clear timelines for claim handling. A formal written request can help move things forward.
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="problem-card">
      <div class="problem-card-icon">📄</div>
      <div class="problem-card-text">
        <strong>Claim denied or partially paid?</strong>
        A written dispute documents your position clearly and professionally — giving you a paper trail that matters.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="how">
  <div class="how-inner">
    <span class="section-label">How it works</span>
    <h2>From rejected to &ldquo;Bumped Up&rdquo; in one afternoon.</h2>
    <p class="how-sub">Three steps. No jargon. Just a clear, professional written dispute — ready to send.</p>
    <div class="steps">
      <div class="step">
        <div class="step-number">Today</div>
        <h3>Check Your Eligibility</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>3-minute intake form — $6*</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="step">
        <div class="step-number">Day 1</div>
        <h3>Review Your Demand Letter</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>AI drafts a professional letter</li>
          <li>You read and approve it</li>
          <li>We send it on your behalf</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="step">
        <div class="step-number">Day 21</div>
        <h3>Get What You're Owed</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Insurer receives a formal demand</li>
          <li>They respond with a revised offer</li>
          <li>No success fee for Alpha members†</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="footnotes">
      * Alpha Launch price: $6 (67% off $18) &nbsp;·&nbsp; † Success fee permanently waived for all Alpha members
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="quotes-section">
  <div class="quotes-inner">
    <h2>Real claims. Real results.</h2>
    <div class="quotes">
      <div class="quote-card">
        <div class="quote-text">I didn't think I could fight my insurance. The letter got me $1,400 more than their first offer for my wrecked car.</div>
        <div class="quote-meta">
          <span class="quote-name">Jessica R.</span>
          <span class="quote-detail">Katy, TX &nbsp;·&nbsp; Total loss claim</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="quote-card">
        <div class="quote-text">Six weeks waiting for payment. Sent the letter on Tuesday. Check arrived Friday.</div>
        <div class="quote-meta">
          <span class="quote-name">Ashley M.</span>
          <span class="quote-detail">Sugar Land, TX &nbsp;·&nbsp; Delayed payment</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="final">
  <div class="final-eyebrow">Alpha Launch — Limited Spots</div>
  <h2>Ready to fight back?</h2>
  <p class="final-sub">Join the Alpha waitlist and lock in founding-member pricing before spots close.</p>
  <div class="final-cta-group">
    <div class="pricing-cards">
      <div class="pricing-card">
        <div class="pricing-card-label">Letter fee</div>
        <div class="pricing-card-value"><s>$18</s> $6 <span class="pricing-card-badge">67% off</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="pricing-card">
        <div class="pricing-card-label">Success fee</div>
        <div class="pricing-card-value"><s>15%</s> $0 <span class="pricing-card-badge">forever</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-final" onclick="openModal()">Check My Claim!</button>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="overlay" id="overlay" onclick="closeOnOverlay(event)">
  <div class="modal">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">×</button>
    <h2 style="font-size:22px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;color:var(--text);">Get Started in 2 Steps</h2>
    <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:24px;">Alpha Launch price — locked in today. Takes about 3 minutes total.</p>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;">
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--highlight);border-radius:14px;padding:20px 22px;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <span style="background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;">1</span>
          <span style="font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:var(--text);">Pay $6 to lock in your spot</span>
        </div>
        <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:14px;">Alpha Launch pricing — 67% off the regular $18 fee. Success fee permanently waived.</p>
        <a class="btn" href="https://wipster0.gumroad.com/l/sycedh" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="width:100%;text-align:center;display:block;box-sizing:border-box;">Pay $6 on Gumroad →</a>
      </div>
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--highlight);border-radius:14px;padding:20px 22px;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <span style="background:var(--highlight);color:var(--accent);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;">2</span>
          <span style="font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:var(--text);">Fill out your intake form</span>
        </div>
        <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:14px;">Tell us about your claim. Takes about 3 minutes — no jargon, just the basics of what happened.</p>
        <a class="btn" href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfxvI7iZ1INHC0TI6iM4VpiIeDhIdFQ4GDrDsd_K9f05KmLiQ/viewform?usp=header" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="width:100%;text-align:center;display:block;box-sizing:border-box;background:var(--surface-2);color:var(--accent);border:1.5px solid var(--accent);">Fill Out Intake Form →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;margin-top:16px;">Questions? Email us at hellobumperai@gmail.com</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div style="background:#F5F3FF;border-top:1px solid #EDE9FE;padding:20px 24px;text-align:center;">
  <p style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:#6B7280;max-width:720px;margin:0 auto;line-height:1.6;"><strong>Legal Disclaimer:</strong> Bumper-AI automates the creation of demand letters under Texas Insurance Code §542. We are not a law firm nor do we provide legal advice. This service adheres to TDI Standards but is not affiliated with or endorsed by the Texas Department of Insurance.</p>
</div>

<script>
  function openModal(){document.getElementById('overlay').classList.add('open');document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}
  function closeModal(){document.getElementById('overlay').classList.remove('open');document.body.style.overflow='';}
  function closeOnOverlay(e){if(e.target===document.getElementById('overlay'))closeModal();}
  document.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){if(e.key==='Escape')closeModal();});
</script>
</body>
</html>
